title: Michael Maier
subtitle: Emblems, courts, and the Atalanta Fugiens, c. 1568–1622

narrative.intro: Imperial physician, Rosicrucian apologist, author of the multimedia emblem book Atalanta Fugiens — between Prague, the German courts, and England.
narrative.provenance_note: Events involving Michael Maier (11 in corpus).
narrative.design_note: Copperplate Engraving: Atalanta Fugiens is literally a book of copperplate emblems (de Bry, 1617); the map borrows its own subject's medium.
